hooks.name: useOutsideClick
hooks.signature: useOutsideClick<K extends HTMLElement>({ref, handler}: UseOutsideClickProps<K>): void
hooks.description: Observes clicks outside a given target element and fires a callback. Listens to mouseup and touchend events.

hooks.name: usePortalContainer
hooks.description: Returns the current portal container element from PortalContext, or document.body as fallback.

hooks.name: useResizeObserver
hooks.signature: useResizeObserver<T extends Element>({ref, onResize, box}: UseResizeObserverProps<T>): void
hooks.description: Observes element size changes using ResizeObserver and fires a callback. Falls back to window resize event.

hooks.name: useSelect
hooks.description: Manages select component state including open/close, selection (single/multiple), and keyboard navigation.

hooks.name: useTimeout
hooks.signature: useTimeout(callback: VoidFunction, ms: number | null | undefined): void

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Function to call after the timeout.

parameters.name: ms
parameters.description: Delay in milliseconds. Pass null/undefined to cancel.

hooks.description: Executes a callback after a specified delay. Automatically cleans up on unmount or when ms changes.

hooks.name: useViewportSize
hooks.description: Returns the current viewport width and height, updating on resize. Uses visualViewport API when available.

hooks.name: useVirtualElementRef

parameters.name: rect
parameters.description: Position rect (top, right, bottom, left) relative to viewport.

parameters.name: contextElement
parameters.description: DOM context element for the virtual element.

hooks.description: Creates a virtual element ref for positioning popups relative to arbitrary viewport coordinates instead of a DOM element.

hooks.name: useUniqId
hooks.description: Generates a unique ID using React.useId when available, with a fallback counter-based implementation.

hooks.name: useLayoutEffect
hooks.description: SSR-safe wrapper around React.useLayoutEffect. No-ops on the server to avoid warnings.

hooks.name: useCollapseChildren

parameters.name: preservedRefs
parameters.description: Refs for elements excluded from calculation.

parameters.name: childSelector
parameters.description: CSS selector to pick child items.

parameters.name: getChildWidth
parameters.description: Custom function to measure item width.

hooks.description: Calculates how many children can fit within a container. Returns visibleCount and recalculate function.

hooks.name: useTheme
hooks.description: Returns the current theme value ('light', 'dark', 'system', 'light-hc', 'dark-hc') from ThemeProvider context.

hooks.name: useThemeValue
hooks.description: Returns the resolved theme value (always a real theme, never 'system'). Resolves 'system' to actual light/dark theme.

hooks.name: useThemeType
hooks.description: Returns the current theme type ('light' or 'dark'), abstracting away high-contrast variants.

hooks.name: useThemeSettings
hooks.description: Returns theme settings (systemLightTheme, systemDarkTheme) from ThemeProvider context.

hooks.name: useDirection
hooks.description: Returns the current text direction ('ltr' or 'rtl') from ThemeProvider context.

hooks.name: useLang
hooks.description: Returns the current language options (lang, fallbackLang) from ThemeProvider context or global configuration.

hooks.name: useMobile
hooks.description: Returns the current mobile boolean value from MobileProvider context. Returns false when used outside a MobileProvider.

hooks.name: usePlatform
hooks.description: Returns the current platform value ('browser', 'ios', or 'android') from MobileProvider context.

hooks.name: useLayoutContext
hooks.signature: useLayoutContext(): { theme: LayoutTheme; activeMediaQuery: MediaType; isMediaActive: (query: MediaType) => boolean; getClosestMediaProps: <T>(map: Partial<Record<MediaType, T>>) => T | undefined }
hooks.return_type: { theme: LayoutTheme; activeMediaQuery: MediaType; isMediaActive: (query: MediaType) => boolean; getClosestMediaProps: <T>(map: Partial<Record<MediaType, T>>) => T | undefined }
hooks.description: Returns the current layout theme and media query helpers from LayoutContext. Provides activeMediaQuery (the current active breakpoint), isMediaActive (returns true if the given breakpoint is active or smaller than the active one, enabling mobile-first logic), and getClosestMediaProps (returns the nearest map value for the active breakpoint using mobile-first resolution).
